summary: Completed frontend testing of School CRM Followup Modal and Edit School Modal features. All 10 features tested and working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All School CRM features tested and working: Followup Modal (Message/Meeting types), Edit School Modal (MOU, Grade Pricing, School Contacts, Payment Details), Contact Management filters (Cities, Roles, Stages)

followup_modal_message_type.details: Message type shows Date + Note only (no time selector). Verified via Playwright automation.

followup_modal_meeting_type.details: Meeting type shows Date + Time + Mode selection (Online/In-Person). All time slots (10:00-17:00) visible.

followup_modal_online_meeting.details: Online meeting mode shows 'Meeting Link' input field with data-testid='meeting-link-input'.

followup_modal_inperson_meeting.details: In-Person meeting mode shows 'Meeting Address' textarea with data-testid='meeting-address-input'.

contact_management_filters.details: Contact Management has three filters: All Cities, All Roles, All Stages. All filters have proper data-testid attributes.

contact_management_filter_functionality.details: Filters correctly narrow down contact list. Initial: 39 contacts, Mumbai filter: 18, Active stage: 14, Primary Contact role: 33.

edit_school_modal_mou_upload.details: Edit School Modal (Active Schools) has MOU Document upload section with file input and view/remove options.

edit_school_modal_grade_pricing.details: Edit School Modal has Grade-wise Student Count & Pricing section with Add Grade button. Shows grade, students, price/student fields.

edit_school_modal_school_contacts.details: Edit School Modal has School Team Contacts section with Add Contact button. Shows name, role, phone, email fields.

edit_school_modal_payment_details.details: Edit School Modal has Payment Details section with Total Amount (₹), Payment Mode (From School/From Student), Payment Method (Cheque/NEFT/Online/Cash).
